display.purpose: Rare reader-facing headings and empty states.

body.purpose: App chrome, controls, settings, and explanatory copy.

mono.purpose: Progress, code paths, and compact numeric controls.

proximity.scaleRange: 1 to 1.12 for app chrome, never 1.5 outside experimental dock-like controls
proximity.rule: Proximity effects enhance controls near the pointer and must fall back to hover, focus, and reduced-motion-safe states.

rules: Reading is the center of gravity.
Configuration belongs away from the reading surface.
Use proximity before extra separator lines.
Avoid colored side-tab borders greater than 1px.

componentNotes.toolbar: 52px shell toolbar with compact 34px icon controls and tonal groups.
componentNotes.sidebar: Library navigation uses grouping, selected tone, and book metadata rather than heavy dividers.
componentNotes.aiPanel: Right companion panel for reading-context conversation only.
componentNotes.settingsPanel: Floating bottom-left settings panel with three primary tabs: AI, Reading Memory, quick prompts.
